title: Test Quick Check
description: A short 10-question quiz pack for testing the game flow, scoring, hints, passes, and end-of-quiz behavior.

questions.prompt: What color do you get when you mix red and yellow?
questions.hint: It is a common fruit color.

questions.prompt: How many days are there in a week?
questions.hint: It is more than five and less than eight.

questions.prompt: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.hint: It is named after the Roman god of war.

questions.prompt: What is the capital of India?
Which animal is called the King of the Jungle?
Which festival is known as the Festival of Lights in India?
How many letters are there in the English alphabet?
Which ocean lies to the south of India?
